examples: I took the phone, and she went discreetly into the living room.
Everyone worked to make him welcome, and, more discreetly, to find out about him.
Dozens of company boards are now discreetly sounding out venture capitalists to see if they will support management buyouts.
The chic lobby features modern seating with international power outlets discreetly placed at the base of each.
By late spring, everyone had agreed to rely on advertising, with the ads discreetly presented.
